distributors.name: Île-de-France Bulk Cement Center
distributors.notes: Primary bulk cement hub for the Paris metropolitan area; silo loading and pneumatic tanker facilities.

distributors.name: Gennevilliers River Cement Terminal
distributors.notes: River barge-fed terminal serving Île-de-France; 24/7 truck loading on request.

distributors.name: Nord Ciments Distribution Lille
distributors.notes: Regional logistics hub for bulk deliveries to northern France and western Belgium.

distributors.name: Val de Loire Bulk Depot
distributors.notes: Specialised in bulk CEM I and CEM II grades for infrastructure projects.

distributors.name: Champagne Construction Supply
distributors.notes: Focus on bagged products for builders' merchants; limited bulk silo capacity.

distributors.name: Rhône-Alpes Cement & Lime Terminal
distributors.notes: High-capacity silos for quicklime and bulk cement; rail-connected.

distributors.name: Ruhr Bulk Cement Terminal
distributors.notes: Bulk cement specialist for industrial customers in the Ruhr area.

distributors.name: Bavaria Cement & Lime Distribution
distributors.notes: Serves ready-mix plants and precast factories across southern Germany.

distributors.name: Thames Bulk Cement Supply
distributors.notes: Marine terminal with ship unloading and bulk dispatch for Greater London.

distributors.name: Gulf Coast Cement & Lime
distributors.notes: Industrial focus, serving petrochemical and infrastructure projects.

distributors.name: Catalunya Eco Cement Center
distributors.notes: Specialised in low-CO2 binders and blended cements.

distributors.name: Lombardia Construction Materials
distributors.notes: Distribution center for small contractors and merchants.

distributors.name: Occitanie Quicklime & Cement Hub
distributors.notes: Strong focus on quicklime for soil stabilisation and industrial users.

distributors.name: Global Projects Export Team
distributors.notes: Handles cross-border and project-based bulk shipments worldwide.

events.title: Designing with Sustainable Cement: Practical Guidelines for Low-Carbon Structures
events.description: A technical webinar focusing on sustainable cement technologies, mix design for reduced CO2, and case studies of industrial floors and foundations.

events.title: Sustainable Cement Innovations for Urban Infrastructure
events.description: Explore advanced clinker substitution, low-CO2 binders, and durability aspects for sustainable urban projects.

events.title: Low-Carbon Concrete Mixes for Industrial & Warehouse Floors
events.description: Detailed look at specifying low-carbon cements in high-performance warehouse and logistics slabs.

events.title: Kiln Process Optimization for Reduced CO2 Emissions
events.description: Operational strategies to lower fuel consumption and emissions in cement kilns.

events.title: European Cement & Lime Sustainability Forum 2025
events.description: Onsite conference bringing together industry leaders to discuss decarbonisation pathways for cement and lime.

events.title: Hands-On Workshop: Testing Cement and Concrete Strength
events.description: Laboratory-based workshop on cement mortar and concrete strength testing.

events.title: Safety Training for Quicklime Handling and Storage
events.description: Essential EHS training on safe handling, storage, and transport of quicklime products.

events.title: Environmental Performance of Modern Lime Kilns
events.description: A seminar on emissions control and efficiency improvements in lime manufacturing.

events.title: Using Digital Tools for Concrete Mix Optimization
events.description: Learn how digital calculators and mix optimization tools can reduce material usage.

events.title: Introduction to Our Low-Carbon Cement Portfolio
events.description: Overview of available eco-labelled cements, their performance and CO2 footprints.

events.title: Customer Open Day at Central Cement Plant
events.description: Plant tour and presentations for key customers.

events.title: Sustainable Cement Solutions for the German Market
events.description: German-language webinar discussing sustainable cement, CO2 reduction and regulatory context in Germany.

job_postings.title: Environmental Engineer - Cement Plant Emissions (Germany)
job_postings.summary: Seeking an Environmental Engineer with at least 3 years of industrial experience to lead emissions monitoring and permitting at our Duisburg cement plant.
job_postings.description: In this role you will oversee environmental compliance, manage emissions data, coordinate stack testing, and support decarbonisation projects across the plant.
job_postings.responsibilities: Lead environmental monitoring programs; manage regulatory reporting; coordinate with authorities; implement improvement projects to reduce CO2, NOx and dust emissions.
job_postings.qualifications: Degree in Environmental Engineering or related field; minimum 3 years of relevant experience in heavy industry; knowledge of EU environmental regulations; fluent German and good English.

job_postings.title: Environmental Engineer - Quarry & Rehabilitation
job_postings.summary: We are hiring an Environmental Engineer (4+ years experience) to manage quarry permits, biodiversity and rehabilitation plans for our East Germany operations.
job_postings.description: The role covers environmental impact assessments, stakeholder engagement and long-term rehabilitation planning for limestone quarries supplying our cement plants.
job_postings.responsibilities: Prepare and update environmental impact studies; lead biodiversity programs; coordinate with local communities and regulators; support internal audits.
job_postings.qualifications: Master's degree in Environmental Engineering, Geology or similar; at least 4 years of relevant experience; working knowledge of German mining law.

job_postings.title: EHS Specialist - Cement Grinding Station
job_postings.summary: Support health, safety and environmental programs at our Bavarian grinding station.
job_postings.description: You will coordinate local EHS initiatives, conduct site inspections and support continuous improvement.
job_postings.responsibilities: Implement EHS standards; develop toolbox talks; support incident investigations.
job_postings.qualifications: Technical degree and 2+ years in EHS, ideally in manufacturing.

job_postings.title: Process Engineer - Clinker Production
job_postings.summary: Process Engineer to optimise clinker production lines and support alternative fuels projects.
job_postings.description: Optimize kiln, cooler and mills; analyse process data; drive energy efficiency.
job_postings.responsibilities: Monitor KPIs; recommend process improvements; support commissioning.
job_postings.qualifications: Degree in Chemical or Process Engineering; several years in cement or similar.

job_postings.title: Maintenance Manager - Lime Plant
job_postings.summary: Lead the maintenance team at our modern lime kiln facility near Valencia.
job_postings.description: Responsible for reliability, preventive maintenance and shutdown planning.
job_postings.responsibilities: Develop maintenance strategy; manage team and contractors; control budget.
job_postings.qualifications: Engineering degree; 5+ years in heavy industry maintenance leadership.

job_postings.title: Sales Manager - Low-Carbon Cements
job_postings.summary: Drive market adoption of our low-carbon cement portfolio with ready-mix and precast customers.
job_postings.description: Develop sales plans, manage key accounts and support technical promotion of eco products.
job_postings.responsibilities: Identify growth opportunities; negotiate contracts; coordinate with technical teams.
job_postings.qualifications: Commercial or engineering background; track record in B2B construction materials.

job_postings.title: IT Analyst - Manufacturing Systems
job_postings.summary: Provide support and improvements for plant manufacturing execution and ERP interfaces.
job_postings.description: Work with plant teams globally to stabilise and enhance production data flows.
job_postings.responsibilities: Resolve incidents; implement change requests; participate in rollout projects.
job_postings.qualifications: IT degree; experience with MES/ERP; strong communication skills.

job_postings.title: Environmental Intern - Sustainability Reporting
job_postings.summary: Six-month internship supporting ESG and sustainability reporting for our European operations.
job_postings.description: Assist with data collection, KPI dashboards and sustainability communications.
job_postings.responsibilities: Gather data; check data quality; prepare presentations.
job_postings.qualifications: Student in environmental studies or engineering; fluent in English and French.

job_postings.title: HR Generalist
job_postings.summary: Support local HR processes for our Italian cement and lime operations.
job_postings.description: Handle recruitment, onboarding and employee relations activities.
job_postings.responsibilities: Coordinate hiring; maintain HR records; support training initiatives.
job_postings.qualifications: HR degree; experience in industrial environment preferred.

job_postings.title: Environmental Engineer - Air & Water Compliance
job_postings.summary: Experienced Environmental Engineer to manage air and water permits at our Texas plants.
job_postings.description: Role already filled; posting kept for reference.
job_postings.responsibilities: Previously responsible for environmental compliance at multiple sites.
job_postings.qualifications: Professional engineer license preferred; experience with US regulations.

products.name: CEM I 42.5R Bulk Portland Cement
products.short_description: General-purpose bulk CEM I 42.5R Portland cement for ready-mix and precast applications.
products.description: High early-strength CEM I 42.5R Portland cement supplied in bulk for structural concrete, industrial floors, and infrastructure projects. Optimised for consistent performance in ready-mix and on-site batching plants.
products.packaging_description: Bulk delivery by silo truck (minimum 20 tons)

products.name: CEM I 52.5R High-Early Strength Bulk Cement
products.short_description: High-early-strength CEM I 52.5R bulk cement for fast-track projects and precast elements.
products.description: Premium CEM I 52.5R bulk Portland cement designed for fast formwork turnaround, precast production and high-strength applications. Provides high early strengths while maintaining excellent workability.
products.packaging_description: Bulk delivery by silo truck (minimum 20 tons)

products.name: CEM II 42.5N Bulk Composite Cement
products.short_description: Versatile bulk CEM II 42.5N cement for structural concrete and general construction.
products.description: Bulk CEM II 42.5N Portland-composite cement suitable for a wide range of structural and civil engineering applications. Offers balanced performance and improved workability.
products.packaging_description: Bulk delivery in pressurised tankers to on-site silos.

products.name: CEM II 32.5R Economy Bulk Cement
products.short_description: Cost-effective bulk cement for mass concrete and non-structural applications.
products.description: Economical CEM II 32.5R Portland-composite cement intended for mass concrete, blinding layers and non-structural elements where moderate strength development is sufficient.

products.name: CEM I 42.5R Portland Cement – 25 kg Bags
products.short_description: High-performance CEM I 42.5R in 25 kg bags for on-site mixing.
products.description: Bagged CEM I 42.5R Portland cement suitable for reinforced concrete, mortars and screeds. Designed for professional contractors and builders' merchants.
products.packaging_description: Shrink-wrapped pallets of 40 × 25 kg bags (1.0 ton per pallet).

products.name: CEM II 32.5R General Purpose Cement – 25 kg Bags
products.short_description: General purpose CEM II 32.5R cement in 25 kg bags for masonry and non-structural concrete.
products.description: Versatile bagged CEM II 32.5R cement ideal for masonry mortars, renders and small concrete works where moderate strength is sufficient.

products.name: CEM I 42.5N Cement – 1.5 Ton Big Bags
products.short_description: CEM I 42.5N in 1.5 ton big bags for medium-sized projects without silo storage.
products.description: CEM I 42.5N Portland cement supplied in high-strength 1.5 ton big bags. Suitable for projects requiring flexible storage and handling with forklifts or cranes.
products.packaging_description: 1.5 ton big bags on pallets (forklift handling).

products.name: Quicklime Lumps QL 90 – Bulk
products.short_description: High-reactivity quicklime lumps with CaO ≥ 90% for industrial and construction uses.
products.description: Premium quicklime in lump form with a guaranteed minimum CaO content of 90%. Suitable for steelmaking, soil stabilisation, flue gas treatment and various industrial processes. Delivered in bulk.
products.packaging_description: Bulk delivery of quicklime lumps in tipping or tanker trucks.

products.name: Quicklime Lumps QL 94 – Big Bags
products.short_description: Very high-purity quicklime lumps with CaO 94–96% in big bags.
products.description: High-purity quicklime lump product with CaO content between 94% and 96%. Supplied in big bags for flexible handling in industrial and water treatment applications.

products.name: Quicklime Milled QM 88 – Bulk
products.short_description: Milled quicklime with CaO 88–90% for flue gas treatment and industrial processes.
products.description: Fine milled quicklime for use in flue gas desulphurisation, sugar refining and various chemical processes. Controlled granulometry with CaO content between 88% and 90%.

products.name: Hydrated Lime HL 90 – 25 kg Bags
products.short_description: Fine hydrated lime in 25 kg bags for masonry, soil treatment and water purification.
products.description: High-quality hydrated lime (calcium hydroxide) with typical CaO equivalent of 90%. Ideal for mortars, renders, soil stabilisation and water treatment applications.
products.packaging_description: 25 kg paper bags on pallets of 40 bags (1.0 ton).

products.name: Hydrated Lime HL 90 – 1 Ton Big Bags
products.short_description: Hydrated lime in 1 ton big bags for medium-sized construction and industrial users.
products.description: High-purity hydrated lime supplied in 1 ton big bags for soil stabilisation, environmental and industrial uses. Suitable where silo storage is not available.
products.packaging_description: 1.0 ton big bags with bottom discharge spout.

products.name: EcoLine LC 42.5R Low-Carbon Cement
products.short_description: Low-carbon bulk cement with CO2 footprint of 410 kg CO2/ton and strength class 42.5R.
products.description: EcoLine LC 42.5R is a low-carbon cement with reduced clinker content and optimised mineral additions. It delivers standard CEM II performance with a CO2 footprint of only 410 kg CO2 per ton.
products.packaging_description: Bulk deliveries to ready-mix plants and large projects.

products.name: EcoLine Ultra LC 42.5N Low-Carbon Cement
products.short_description: Ultra-low-carbon cement with CO2 footprint of 390 kg CO2/ton for demanding sustainable projects.
products.description: EcoLine Ultra LC 42.5N is an advanced low-carbon cement formulated with high levels of supplementary cementitious materials. It achieves a CO2 footprint of just 390 kg CO2 per ton while maintaining robust strength development.
products.packaging_description: Bulk delivery to project silos and ready-mix plants.

products.name: EcoBlend CEM II 42.5N (Standard CO2)
products.short_description: Blended CEM II cement with moderate CO2 footprint around 460 kg CO2/ton.
products.description: EcoBlend CEM II 42.5N offers a modest reduction in CO2 compared with traditional CEM I, using limestone and slag additions. Suitable for general purpose structural concrete.

products.name: EcoLine Premium LC 52.5R
products.short_description: High-strength low-carbon cement (52.5R) with CO2 footprint 430 kg CO2/ton.
products.description: EcoLine Premium LC 52.5R combines high early strength with a significantly reduced CO2 footprint of 430 kg CO2 per ton. Ideal for precast and post-tensioned structures with strict sustainability targets.

products.name: Bulk Clinker for Grinding – Industrial
products.short_description: Bulk clinker for grinding and blending in regional cement plants.
products.description: High-quality Portland clinker supplied in bulk for regional grinding stations and cement producers. Suitable for producing CEM I, CEM II and blended binders.
products.packaging_description: Bulk shipment by truck, rail or vessel.

product_categories.name: Cement Products
product_categories.description: Bulk and bagged Portland and composite cements for structural concrete, masonry, and infrastructure projects.

product_categories.name: Lime Products
product_categories.description: Quicklime and hydrated lime in lump, milled, and powdered forms for construction, industrial, and environmental applications.

product_categories.name: Low-Carbon Cements
product_categories.description: Eco-optimised low-CO2 cements with reduced clinker content and improved sustainability performance.
